---
title: "Lesson 3: Past vs Present (Perfect Question)"
slug: ch5-lesson3-past-vs-present
format:
  html:
      toc: true
      html-math-method: katex
---

## Lesson Slides

```{=html}
<iframe
  src="past_vs_present-PERFECT.pdf"
  width="100%"
  height="650px"
  style="border:none;">
</iframe>
```
---

## Optional: Open in full screen

```{=html}
<a href="past_vs_present-PERFECT.pdf" target="_blank">
🔍 Open Slides Full Screen
</a>
```
